title: Ultimate Bingo
description: This Modpack is completely about playing Minecraft Bingo as easy as possible.
body:
# Ultimate Bingo
This Modpack is all about playing Minecraft Bingo as easy as possible while still having a lot of features and possibilities!
The Modpack is completely based on the Mod [Yet another Minecraft Bingo](https://modrinth.com/mod/yet-another-minecraft-bingo) and without it, this project wouldn't exist.



**Features:**
- Play Bingo with all of the options of [Yet another Minecraft Bingo](https://modrinth.com/mod/yet-another-minecraft-bingo)
- Use [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) to invite your friends to your Bingo game
- Look at the actionbar to see your current coords
- Have incredible performance with a lot of performance mods
- Customize the Bingo game and it's scoreboard like you want (customize the scoreboard with the options in Mod Menu)
- Use [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) to coordinate your team to the win
- Use shaders with the help of [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- And **much** more...
